extensionDescription.message: Send the current page to selected NotebookLM notebooks.

notebookSearchCreateLabel.message: Notebook search and new notebook name

footerDisclaimer.message: Independent helper. Not affiliated with Google or NotebookLM.

notebookListUnreadable.message: Could not read the notebook list result.

currentPageUnavailable.message: Could not get the current page. $ERROR$

currentPageNotReady.message: The current page is not available yet.

selectDigestDestination.message: Select at least one digest destination.

digestJobStarted.message: Started adding to digest notebooks. This will continue if you close the popup.

selectThemeDestination.message: Select at least one theme destination.

themeJobStarted.message: Started adding to theme notebooks. This will continue if you close the popup.

createNotebookResultUnreadable.message: Could not read the new notebook creation result.

notebookCreatedRefreshing.message: Created the notebook. Refreshing the list.

notebookAddResultUnreadable.message: Could not get the NotebookLM add result.

unsupportedCurrentPage.message: This page cannot be read by the Chrome extension.

directBatchAddComplete.message: Sent add requests to NotebookLM ($COUNT$ notebooks). Check the source list in NotebookLM if needed.

dateNotebookAddComplete.message: $PERIOD$ notebook "$TITLE$" was $ACTION$, and the URL add request was sent.

notebookLoginCheck.message: Check that you are signed in to NotebookLM.

notebookRpcEmpty.message: The NotebookLM RPC response was empty.

notebookRpcUnexpected.message: The NotebookLM RPC response format was unexpected.

notebookCreateFailed.message: Could not create the new NotebookLM notebook. You may have reached the notebook limit.

sourceAddFailed.message: Could not add the URL to the NotebookLM notebook. The notebook source limit, a protected page, or an unsupported URL may be the cause.

notebookTabOpenFailed.message: Could not open the NotebookLM tab.

notebookTabResultUnreadable.message: Could not get the URL add result from the NotebookLM tab.

tokenMissingTitle.message: Could not verify NotebookLM sign-in state.

tokenMissingAction.message: Check that you are signed in to NotebookLM and that the page finished loading.

directAddSuccessMessage.message: URL add succeeded: Sent the source add RPC to NotebookLM.

communicationFailureAction.message: Check your network connection and try again.

loginPermissionFailureTitle.message: You are not signed in to NotebookLM, or you cannot access this notebook.

loginPermissionFailureAction.message: Check your NotebookLM sign-in state and the Google account for the registered notebook URL.

rateLimitedFailureTitle.message: NotebookLM may have limited repeated additions.

rateLimitedFailureAction.message: Wait a while and try again.

serverFailureTitle.message: NotebookLM may have a temporary error.

serverFailureAction.message: Reload NotebookLM or wait a while and try again.

sourceRejectedFailureTitle.message: NotebookLM responded, but the source add result was empty.

sourceRejectedFailureAction.message: The notebook source limit, a protected page, or an unsupported URL may be the cause.

responseChangedFailureTitle.message: NotebookLM's internal response format was unexpected.

responseChangedFailureAction.message: NotebookLM may have changed its behavior. The extension needs an update.

unknownFailureTitle.message: The NotebookLM source add RPC did not succeed.

unknownFailureAction.message: Check the source list in NotebookLM and try again if needed.

directAddStatusOkTitle.message: Read Later Is Broken: URL add succeeded

directAddStatusNgTitle.message: Read Later Is Broken: URL add failed
